K0510Z1_NO_FEEDG_PRIOR_CD K0510Z1 Nutritional Approaches: Prior None of Above Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received no nutritional approaches while NOT a resident of this faciltity within the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 4/01/2012
discontinued 9/30/2023
391 K0510Z2_NO_FEEDG_POST_CD K0510Z2_NO_FEEDG_POST_CD K0510Z2 Nutritional Approaches: Post None of Above Code CHAR 1
